LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 3RD, AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PER CCP SECTION 430.10(C). DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST EXPLICITLY ALLEGE WHICH OF DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIONS WERE FALSE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MAY REASSERT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IF SHE CAN ADEQUATELY AMEND THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-14-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 3RD, AND 4TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND PER CCP SECTION 430.10(c).
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST EXPLICITLY ALLEGE WHICH OF DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIONS WERE FALSE.
DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MAY REASSERT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IF SHE CAN ADEQUATELY AMEND THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
